title: Whimscape JEI/REI/ALI Addon
description: Adds and improves Whimscape support for modern recipe viewers like Just Enough Items, Roughly Enough Items, and Advanced Loot Info.
body:
• Improves and fixes scaling, splicing, and clipping issues with the already existing support for [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) offered by [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape). 

• Adds [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) support

• Adds [ALI](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-loot-info) support

Kavast if you see this feel free to steal / use any of this. I'm aware youre just as capable of doing all this and more but, if it would save you some time or if you deem any of this useful, help yourself.
